name: Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.
summary: Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and testing of integrated circuits in Taiwan. The company operates through two divisions, Testing and Packaging. It offers wafer sort, final and post test, engineering support, and test platforms services; copper pillar bump, wafer level chip scale package, lead free bump, plating bump / ball drop, and backside metallization services; die processing services, wafer thinning, singulation, and flip chip packaging services; and failure analysis and reliability test services. The company was formerly known as Stats ChipPac Taiwan Semiconductor Corp. and changed its name to Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. in June 2015. Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan. Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Singapore Merchants Bloomeria Limited.
